title: VillagerTradeStats
description: QOL Utility mod for villager trading and villager XP
body:
## Features
Shows the XP given to villager for each trade

Shows how many trades left until trade disabled

Highlights trade with most xp (green)

Shows current villager XP
This mod will require YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) and ModMenu to access the configuration. ![Image of the mod, shows Villager XP, trades until disabled, and XP of each trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zg7MrtH6/images/ee52e249765e81bba0e9e0e6e25fe4f664b305e5.png) If you have any issues, please go to the github page and report it.
